visitor_messages: ["So basically here's our situation — we're QuantumLeap, a B2B SaaS company focused on developer tools, we have about 65 employees across our offices in Berlin and London. Response times have ballooned to 8+ hours which is unacceptable because we know from our data that leads contacted within 5 minutes are 10x more likely to convert. We've been losing enterprise deals left and right to competitors who respond faster. This is our top priority right now — we need this solved within the next 3-4 weeks because we have a major product launch coming up that will likely double our inbound volume. We've already got budget approved at €22,000 for this quarter, and as the VP of Growth I have full authority to make this purchase decision. Please help us get started ASAP. My email is test-edge-001@test.halo-lab.team if you need it."]

visitor_messages: ["Let me give you the full picture because I know you'll need all of this. I'm the Director of Revenue Operations at CloudSync Solutions, which is a mid-market B2B SaaS company. We currently have 85 full-time employees split between our main office in Amsterdam and a remote team spread across Europe. Our platform helps businesses synchronize their cloud infrastructure across multiple providers — AWS, Azure, GCP. We've been growing pretty fast, about 40% year over year, and that growth has exposed some serious gaps in our sales process. Specifically, our website gets a ton of traffic — around 15,000 unique visitors per month — and about 3% of those convert to some kind of inquiry. That means roughly 450 inbound leads per month that need to be qualified. Right now we have a team of 6 SDRs handling this, but even with that team size, our average response time is sitting at around 4 hours during business hours and much worse outside of them. We've done analysis showing that leads who get a response within 15 minutes convert at 3x the rate of those who wait 4+ hours. So the math is simple — faster, smarter qualification equals more revenue. We're currently using Salesforce as our CRM with Pardot for marketing automation, and our website runs on a custom Next.js build. Our tech team is very capable and open to integrations. In terms of timeline, we need this operational within 6 weeks because we're launching a major enterprise push in Q2 and we need the qualification infrastructure in place before that campaign goes live. Budget-wise, we've allocated €25,000 for this initiative, already approved by our CFO. I have full authority to make the purchasing decision. What are the next steps? My email is test-edge-004@test.halo-lab.team"]
expected_checks: [{"type":"table_variable","variable":"lead_score","expected":"Hot","description":"Should handle very long message and score correctly"},{"type":"response_contains","message_index":-1,"text":"cal.com","description":"Should offer booking link for Hot lead"},{"type":"total_bot_messages","min":1,"max":5,"description":"Should not need many messages when visitor provided everything"}]
